title: Slimefun Resourcepack
description: A simple remake version of Slimefun Resourcepack
body:
Slimefun Resourcepack

[![GitHub Release][github-release-badge]][github] [![Modrinth][modrinth-badge]][modrinth] [![Discord][discord-badge]][discord-invite] [![All Contributors][all-contributors-badge]](#-contributors) [![GitHub Stars][github-star-badge]][github]

A simple remix & remake Slimefun Resourcepack
Generated by [ItemsAdder][spigot-itemsadder]
(Not required ItemsAdder to run!)
**Now available on [Modrinth][modrinth]!**

Warning: Most of the textures are from the internet, all right reserved to the original author.

------

🌎 Language

[![Lang-Readme-TW][tw-badge]][readme-tw] [![Lang-Readme-CN][cn-badge]][readme-cn] [![Lang-Readme-EN][en-badge]][readme-main]
------ ## 🌠 Recommand Mods | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | [CIT Resewn][modrinth-cit] | Support more custom item feature
(ex `Armor Layer`) | | [Slimefun Essentials][modrinth-slimefun-essentials] | Support EMI, REI, JEI recipes view and more!
Checkout mod description to see. | ## ⚙️ Installation
🎮 Player Download resourecpack on [Modrinth][modrinth], and load it at minecraft. > ℹ️ Note
> Server owner must install `item-models.yml` on server to match up the items.
💻 Server Owner - item-models installation 1. Download `item-models.zip` at [Modrinth][modrinth].
You can find it under the version tab and click a version
Three files can be downloaded. 2. Unzip `item-models.zip` to get `item-models.yml`. 3. Place it under `plugins/Slimefun/`. - ItemsAdder installation 1. Download `ia-addons.zip` at [Modrinth][modrinth]
You can find it under the version tab and click a version
Three files can be downloaded. 2. Unzip `ia-addons.zip`, and place `contents` at `plugins/ItemsAdder`. 3. Type `/iareload` to load new texture.
`/iazip` to zip up new assets.
## 🚩 Version Format We are using Semantic Versioning v2 format. Only some differences, like *Major* version won't be changed. Format vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH: - **Major**: Won't be changed (will be changed if I want to redo ID range list) - **Minor**: When changing or adding new textures - **Patch**: When fixing, update path, mc version, etc ## 📝 Content and Information There are still a lot of textures missing! Welcome to contribute more textures!
CIT Support List - InfinityExpansion Armor - Slimefun Armor - ExtraGear Armor
Model ID Range | Name | Range | | --- | --- | | Slimefun | 2200001 - 2200600 | | InfinityExpansion | 2200601 - 2200679 | | SlimyTreeTaps | 2200800 - 2200809 | | LiteXpansion | 2200810 - 2200829 | | ExoticGarden | 2200830 - 2201200 | | ExtraGear | 2201201 - 2201270 | | SimpleUtils | 2201270 - 2201279 | | FluffyMachines | 2201280 - 2201400 | | Bump | 2201401 - 2201470 | | Supreme | 2201471 - 2202000 | | SlimefunWarfare | 2202001 - 2202200 | | Gastronomicon | 2203001 - 2203500 | | Liquid | 2204000 - 2204200 | | Cultivation | 2300000 - 2300300 | | Electric Spawners | 2300400 - 2300500 | | DyedBackpacks | 2300800 - 2300900 | | FoxyMachines* | 2301000 - 2301200 |
